name: Rolling update with active requests

injection.description: Perform a rolling update of the serving deployment (gateway instances and/or engine backends) while streams are active and load is steady.

expected_gateway_semantics: Each terminating instance follows fs-05 drain semantics: preStop drain hook, readiness false, accepted streams complete within the grace period (grace > max stream duration per the deployment contract).
Each new instance follows fs-11 warm-up-aware readiness: no traffic before warm, no restart loops.
Aggregate ready capacity never falls below the disruption budget; the rollout completes with zero client-visible errors.
expected_client_visible_behavior: Zero client-visible errors across the entire rollout: in-flight streams complete, new requests land only on ready instances, latency stays within SLO.

metrics_that_must_move.expectation: drains to 0 per terminating instance in sequence; aggregate never drops to 0
transitions 1->0 (drain) and 0->1 (warm) per instance in rollout order, never all at once

metrics_that_must_not_move.expectation: no status_class=5xx increase attributable to the rollout
p95 stays within SLO throughout the rollout

abort_condition: Abort (pause the rollout, keep current instances) if any client-visible error is attributable to the rollout, or if ready capacity falls below the disruption-budget floor.
